content:
type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
your_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
note: Agreed. My exact additions: Cache.__init__ gains 'ttl: Optional[int] = None' param (stored as self.ttl); memory cache becomes TTLCache(maxsize=memory_max_entries, ttl=ttl) when ttl is not None else LRUCache(maxsize=memory_max_entries) - import TTLCache from cachetools. Cache.put() uses self.disk_cache.set(key, value, expire=self.ttl) when self.ttl is not None else self.disk_cache[key]=value. Cache.get() calls self.disk_cache.expire() on miss when self.ttl is set. dspy/clients/__init__.py: configure_cache() gains 'ttl: Optional[int] = None' param passed into Cache(...); new function set_ttl(seconds: Optional[int]) that updates DSPY_CACHE.ttl; DSPY_CACHE construction gains ttl=None default; 'set_ttl' added to __all__. I'll push shortly and send DONE.

content:
type: DONE
my_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
note: TTL implementation complete, tested, committed as ae3faf81, and pushed to team/agent1. Summary of what changed: cache.py - Cache.__init__ new 'ttl: Optional[int]=None' param stored as self.ttl; memory cache uses TTLCache(maxsize=memory_max_entries, ttl=ttl) when ttl set else LRUCache; put() uses disk_cache.set(key,value,expire=self.ttl) when ttl set else dict-style assignment; get() calls disk_cache.expire() on miss when ttl set. __init__.py - configure_cache() gains ttl param passed to Cache(); DSPY_CACHE gains ttl=None; new set_ttl(seconds) function updates dspy.cache.ttl and rebuilds memory_cache as TTLCache/LRUCache accordingly; 'set_ttl' added to __all__; added 'from cachetools import LRUCache, TTLCache' import. Ready for you to merge team/agent1 into your branch whenever convenient.
